_doc: Webstudio project brand template. Copy this file to ./projects/<slug>-brand.json and fill it in. Then run `/ws-onboard <slug>` for full setup.

webstudio._doc: Retrieve from the Webstudio builder. projectId = the part after 'p-' in the URL.

brand._doc: Brand style guide. All sub-objects are optional — only include what is defined for the client.

colors._doc: Hex strings. Short, stable slugs. Generate 'color-<slug>' tokens.

spacings._doc: Values in px. Generate 'spacing-<slug>' tokens (padding 4 sides).

radii._doc: Values in px. Generate 'radius-<slug>' tokens (border-radius 4 sides).
